## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint --workspace @ghumle/api`
- [ ] `npm run lint --workspace @ghumle/web`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused
- [ ] I updated docs or contracts if behavior changed
- [ ] I did not commit secrets or local-only artifacts
- [ ] I considered responsiveness and accessibility for UI changes
